data.title: Implement _ticketlib_has_flock detection and python3 fcntl fallback in ticket-lib-api.sh
data.description:
## Task

Implement `_ticketlib_has_flock` detection helper and fallback logic in ticket-lib-api.sh so all RED tests from task cc08-555d pass.

### Changes Required

1. At library source time, set detection var:
   ```bash
   command -v flock >/dev/null 2>&1 && _ticketlib_has_flock=1 || _ticketlib_has_flock=0
   ```

2. In any internal function that uses file locking (e.g., write_commit_event or equivalent), branch:
   - `_ticketlib_has_flock=1`: use `flock -x -n "$lockfile" ...` (Linux/macOS hard requirement)
   - `_ticketlib_has_flock=0`: use python3 fcntl.flock fallback:
     ```python
     import fcntl, sys, os
     fd = open(sys.argv[1], 'w')
     fcntl.flock(fd, fcntl.LOCK_EX)
     # run op, then release
     ```

3. Document realpath/sha1sum/md5sum BusyBox fallbacks inline where behavior differs from GNU coreutils (flag differences in stat, sha1sum vs sha1, etc.)

4. Shell-special-char safety: ensure all JSON writes use python3 json.dumps (already in ticket_reducer) — no raw bash string interpolation into JSON fields.

## Testing Mode

GREEN — make tests/scripts/test-ticket-platform-compat.sh pass (tests written in cc08-555d).

## File Impact

- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh (UPDATE — add _ticketlib_has_flock + fallback branch)

## Acceptance

- `bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-platform-compat.sh` exits 0 (GREEN)
- All existing ticket tests continue to pass
